extortion.description: [AI generated] NorthernOntarioWires.com is a company based in Northern Ontario, Canada. It operates in the utilities sector, specifically in the distribution of electricity. The company aims to supply reliable electric service to its customers in a cost-effective manner. It primarily serves the residential and commercial sectors in Northern Ontario. It's known for its commitment to meet the power needs of the community while ensuring the safety and welfare of both its workers and the public.
